## 7. Reviewer Checklist
- [ ] Signal summary is factually accurate.
- [ ] Why it matters is actionable for QuantLab.
- [ ] No duplication with existing items (checked archive).
- [ ] Score justification is sound (components match).
- [ ] Source is in `approved-sources.yaml`.
- [ ] Category is in `category-taxonomy.es.md`.
- [ ] Priority band matches score (P1≥70, P2≥40, P3<40).
- [ ] Editorial override (if any) has a clear reason.
- [ ] Tags are appropriate (2-6 tags).
